instruction: The small green dot on this italic icon drifted. Put it back exactly where it belongs. (subtler offset — read the original coordinates carefully).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/italic.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5.248 20.246H9.05m0 0h3.696m-3.696 0 5.893-16.502m0 0h-3.697m3.697 0h3.803"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#22c55e" cx="10" cy="106" r="2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/italic.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5.248 20.246H9.05m0 0h3.696m-3.696 0 5.893-16.502m0 0h-3.697m3.697 0h3.803"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#22c55e" cx="16" cy="112" r="2" />
</svg>
